meta.title: Services
meta.description: Every millwork capability under one roof — pre-construction through warranty and aftercare.

hero.title: Every millwork capability, under one roof.
hero.description: Pre-construction, engineering, manufacturing, finishing, project management, logistics, installation and warranty. One accountable Canadian manufacturer.

vs.label: Services vs. Sectors
vs.whatBody: Every millwork capability we offer — from pre-construction engineering and manufacturing to finishing, project management, logistics, installation, and warranty.
vs.whereBodyBefore: For the industries and building types we serve — healthcare, education, hospitality, retail, multi-residential, government and more — see the

cta.title: Send us your drawings. We'll return a line-item quote in one business day.
Have drawings for a {{name}} package?
cta.description: Send us the set and finish schedule — we'll return a line-item quote within one business day.

standards: AWMAC NAAWS 4.0 · AWMAC GIS third-party inspection
CSA / OBC / NBC · CSA B651 / AODA / ADA
CARB Phase 2 / TSCA Title VI · LEED / WELL

defaultProcess.description: Take-off from your drawings, specs and finish schedule. Line-item quote returned within one business day for most packages.
In-house team produces AWI/AWMAC-compliant shop drawings in AutoCAD, coordinated with Microvellum for direct-to-machine output.
Finish samples, hardware cut-sheets and drawing set submitted for architect/GC approval prior to release to production.
Panels nested and machined on multi-axis CNC. Solid-wood machining, edge-banding and dowel/confirmat assembly in dedicated cells.
Controlled-environment spray booths for stain, lacquer, conversion varnish, catalyzed polyurethane and low-VOC waterborne systems.
100% dimensional and finish inspection against the approved shop drawings. Pre-assembled where practical for site-fit certainty.
Blanket-wrapped, phased delivery coordinated with your site schedule. Installation supervision available Canada-wide.

pre-construction.title: Pre-Construction
pre-construction.description: Design assist, budgets, VE and constructability review — before the CDs go out.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.description: Shop drawings, 3D models, Microvellum output and architect/consultant coordination.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Custom architectural millwork, casework, CNC, laminate, veneer, solid surface, metal integration and in-house finishing.

sector-scopes.title: Sector Scopes
sector-scopes.description: Sector-specific millwork packages engineered to the codes of the environment.

project-management.title: Project Management
project-management.description: Dedicated PMs, scheduling, procurement, site coordination and QA.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.description: Packaging, delivery, JIT release and site logistics — Canada-wide plus CUSMA cross-border.

installation.title: Installation
installation.description: Professional install, site supervision, deficiency management and closeout.

warranty.title: Warranty & Aftercare
warranty.description: Warranty support, maintenance, repairs, future renovations and service requests.

design-assist.name: Design Assist
design-assist.description: Millwork design partnership — shop drawings, 3D models, veneer & finish samples before you tender.

budget-estimating.name: Millwork Budget Estimating
budget-estimating.description: In-house millwork estimating team — order-of-magnitude to firm line-item pricing.

value-engineering.name: Value Engineering
value-engineering.description: Cost-out options without losing the design intent.

constructability-review.name: Millwork Constructability Review
constructability-review.description: Strictly millwork — second-set-of-eyes review on the architectural millwork set before you tender.

shop-drawings-engineering.name: Millwork Shop Drawings & Engineering
shop-drawings-engineering.description: In-house millwork drawing and engineering — from redlines to CNC-ready production files.

3d-modeling.name: Millwork 3D Modeling & Visualization
3d-modeling.description: Photoreal 3D renders and CNC-ready models — strictly for architectural millwork.

architect-consultant-coordination.name: Architect & Consultant Coordination
architect-consultant-coordination.description: One PM coordinating our millwork with the architect, ID and consultant team.

cnc-manufacturing.name: CNC Machining Department
cnc-manufacturing.description: Multi-axis CNC production for tight-tolerance components.

custom-fabrication.name: Custom & Assembly Department
custom-fabrication.description: In-house assembly line for high-volume casework plus a custom shop for the complex, one-of-one millwork.

finishing-paint.name: In-House Finishing Department
finishing-paint.description: Sanding to Cefla robotic flatline to manual booths to Sunspot dry room. Strictly for our own millwork.

solid-surface-work.name: Solid Surface & Glass
solid-surface-work.description: Corian fabricated in-house, plus quartz, granite, marble and architectural glass — coordinated as one interior-millwork package.

plastic-laminate-fabrication.name: Plastic Laminate Fabrication
plastic-laminate-fabrication.description: Precision HPL / CRL fabrication on Wilsonart, Formica, Arborite, Nevamar and Pionite.

veneer-hardwood-fabrication.name: Veneer & Hardwood Fabrication
veneer-hardwood-fabrication.description: Sequence and grain-matched veneer walls, plus solid-hardwood millwork.

metal-integration.name: Architectural Metal Integration
metal-integration.description: Wood millwork fixtures that need metal — servery aprons, kicks, brackets, reveals, kitchens — delivered as one package.

healthcare-millwork.name: Healthcare Millwork
healthcare-millwork.description: Hospital-grade millwork engineered for infection control, water resistance, and low-disturbance install in live patient environments.

retail-fixtures.name: Retail Fixtures
retail-fixtures.description: Rollout-ready fixtures produced with repeatable accuracy at scale.

hospitality-millwork.name: Hospitality Millwork
hospitality-millwork.description: Premium-grade architectural millwork for luxury and full-service hotels.

multi-residential-millwork.name: Multi-Residential Millwork
multi-residential-millwork.description: One millwork division for the whole tower — lobby to penthouse.

restaurant-qsr-millwork.name: Restaurant & QSR Millwork
restaurant-qsr-millwork.description: Two organized scopes: bespoke full-service restaurants, and rollout-ready QSR programs.

education-millwork.name: Education Millwork
education-millwork.description: Millwork for every learning environment — daycare to university, existing and new-build.

corporate-institutional-millwork.name: Corporate, Bank & Institutional Millwork
corporate-institutional-millwork.description: One millwork partner for banks, offices, libraries and every professional workplace.

custom-cabinets.name: Custom Residential Millwork
custom-cabinets.description: Bespoke millwork and panelling for designer homes — not standard tender packages.

project-management.name: Project Management
project-management.description: Dedicated PMs from award through closeout.

scheduling.name: Scheduling
scheduling.description: Millwork schedule built inside your master construction schedule.

procurement.name: Procurement
procurement.description: Long-lead material commitments locked at award, not after shop drawings.

site-coordination.name: Site Coordination
site-coordination.description: Site walks, blocking coordination, MEP/AV rough-in verification.

quality-assurance.name: Quality Assurance
quality-assurance.description: 100% pre-ship inspection against approved shop drawings and finish samples.

delivery-logistics.name: Delivery & Logistics
delivery-logistics.description: Coordinated delivery for phased and multi-site rollouts.

packaging.name: Packaging & Crating
packaging.description: Blanket-wrapped, palletized and crated for zero transit damage.

just-in-time-delivery.name: Just-In-Time Delivery
just-in-time-delivery.description: Millwork lands on the floor the day the install trade needs it.

site-logistics.name: Site Logistics
site-logistics.description: Loading-dock booking, hoisting, floor protection and swing-space coordination.

installation-coordination.name: Installation Coordination
installation-coordination.description: On-site coordination with your install trades.

site-supervision.name: Site Supervision
site-supervision.description: Sandha lead supervisor on every install, Canada-wide.

deficiency-management.name: Deficiency Management
deficiency-management.description: Deficiency register through closeout with committed close dates.

project-closeout.name: Project Closeout
project-closeout.description: As-builts, O&M manuals, LEED docs, warranty package — delivered in one binder.

warranty-support.name: Warranty Support
warranty-support.description: 1-year AWMAC/AWI workmanship + extended finish and cabinet-box warranties.

maintenance-repairs.name: Maintenance & Repairs
maintenance-repairs.description: Scheduled inspections, touch-up crews and out-of-warranty repairs.

future-renovations.name: Future Renovations
future-renovations.description: PIP-cycle refurbishment, tenant-improvement re-fits, brand refreshes.

service-requests.name: Service Requests
service-requests.description: One phone number, one inbox for every service request across every project.
